table.selectAll: Select all rows on this page
table.groupHint: Torrent/Usenet release group inferred from the filename only.
table.scoreHint: Scout queue candidate score uses library priority logic: round((CriticRating * 0.4) + (IMDbRating * 6)). Release CF scoring rules are configurable in Settings → CF Scoring, Rules, Scout.

status.noCandidates: No upgrade candidates with current filters.
status.noCandidatesDetail: Scout Queue requires Metacritic and IMDb ratings — these come from Jellyfin Sync (Scan & Sync page). If you haven't synced yet, all ratings are null and no movies will appear here. Try setting Min MC and Min IMDb to 0 to see all scanned movies regardless of ratings.
